message:
revert: Back to working HashMap encoder (100% correct)

Status:
✅ Correctness: 100% (594/594 with HashMap encoder)
❌ Speed: 33x slower than rs-bpe

What Was Ported from rs-bpe:
✅ Aho-Corasick (400+ lines from daachorse) - complete double-array
✅ split_table building (lines 289-320)
✅ isValidTokenPair (lines 112-148) - complete algorithm
✅ cl100k_base regex splitter (242 lines pure Zig)
✅ BacktrackEncoder struct (lines 12-87)
✅ BitField for backtracking
✅ step() method with validation

What's NOT Working:
❌ Backtracking encoder gives WRONG results
❌ Greedy longest-match incompatible with tiktoken merge-based BPE
❌ Cannot match rs-bpe speed

Current Best: HashMap O(n²) encoder
- 14.6s vs rs-bpe 0.44s (100 iterations)
- 100% correctness
- 30,000 tiny chunks × O(n²) = slow
